event: Elgiva seized by soldiers on the order of Archbishop Odo
description: A fine pencil or ink line drawing showing a dramatic scene of a woman (Elgiva) being violently seized and dragged away by two muscular men in medieval garments. She struggles, her hair loose and her robes flowing. On the far left, two women in veils look on in distress. On the right, more figures and architectural elements suggest a palace or church setting. The drawing is precise and classical in style, with careful attention to drapery and anatomy. A date signature is visible at the bottom right.

_meta.title: Elgiva seized by order of Odo, Archbishop of Canterbury
